NEEDS IMPROVEMENT 57.4% mean CER  (threshold < 30%)

Mean CER 57.4% exceeds the 30% threshold. Failed: IMG_4256.JPG (83.7%), IMG_4257.JPG (84.2%). Passed: IMG_4255.JPG (4.3%). Failure mode(s): high CER despite tokens detected — likely reading-order errors on curved/rotated surfaces (IMG_4256.JPG, IMG_4257.JPG).

Character Error Rate (CER) — edit distance between recognised and expected text, divided by the length of the expected text. Lower is better; 0% = perfect match.
< 10% excellent 10–30% acceptable 30–60% poor > 60% failing > 100% hypothesis longer than reference
